Package com.kbtu.university.storage

Class DataStorage

java.lang.Object
com.kbtu.university.storage.DataStorage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DataStorage extends Object implements Serializable
Singleton in-memory database for the university system. All operations on users, courses, marks, papers, projects and news flow through here so that application state can be serialized to a single file and restored.
See Also:
